description: FLAE Robotics is a Czech AI and robotics company focused on hospitality. Its BE-A product provides AI-based hotel front-office and guest communication capabilities, including hotel search and availability data.
summary: flaerobotics.ai exposes a public BE-A MCP server at `https://beamcpserverprod.flaerobotics.ai/mcp` and a public REST API for hotel discovery and availability, documented by an OpenAPI spec at `https://beamcpserverprod.flaerobotics.ai/openapi.json`.
